High-quality Accommodation Services

Book Now

Welcome To City Prime Apartments In Kensington, London

Welcome to our brand new 4 star luxury apartments in Kensington, Central London. Stay with us to be close to Chelsea’s designer shops, Harrods, Kensington Palace and the Royal Albert Hall.

We are within easy reach of so many of London’s premier attractions. Within a short stroll you’ll come to the Natural History Museum, Science Museum and V&A.

About US

To relax in beautiful green surroundings, head to Holland Park, Kensington Gardens and Hyde Park, all within walking distance. It’s just a 5 minutes walk to Earl’s Court Tube Station for direct access to Heathrow Airport and the West End.

Get a 10% discount by booking directly with our website www.cpaStay.com

Use code CPA10 to apply this discount with all of our 4 stars luxury apartments.

Always cheaper by booking directly with us.

THANKS TO YOU, WE HAVE BEEN RECOGNISED!

Luxury Rooms & Suites

Deluxe One Bedroom Apartments with 2 Double Sofa Beds

Indulge in our Deluxe One Bedroom Apartments, complete with two luxurious double sofa beds, perfect for extra guests. Enjoy spacious living areas, modern amenities, and a private bedroom for ultimate comfort. Experience the perfect blend of style and convenience at our hotel, designed for your relaxation and enjoyment.

Explore
Book Now

Deluxe One Bedroom Apartments with 2 Double Sofa Beds

Deluxe Studio Apartment with Twin Beds

Indulge in comfort and style in our Deluxe Studio Apartment with Twin Beds. Enjoy the convenience of two plush twin beds, a modern ensuite bathroom, a fully equipped kitchenette, and a cozy living area. Unwind with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen TV, and a stunning city view. Your perfect urban retreat awaits!

Explore
